name: annotated_variant_table
description: Schema for the local Iceberg-like annotated variant output table.

fields.name: chrom
fields.description: Chromosome or contig from the input VCF.

fields.name: pos
fields.description: 1-based variant position from the input VCF.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Variant identifier from the VCF ID column.

fields.name: ref
fields.description: Reference allele from the input VCF.

fields.name: alt
fields.description: Alternate allele from the input VCF after normalization.

fields.name: qual
fields.description: Quality value from the VCF QUAL column.

fields.name: filter
fields.description: Filter value from the VCF FILTER column.

fields.name: vep_consequence
fields.description: Most severe VEP-style consequence label.

fields.name: clinvar_found
fields.description: Whether the variant matched the local ClinVar parquet.

fields.name: clinvar_variation_id
fields.description: ClinVar variation identifier from the local ClinVar parquet.

fields.name: clinical_significance
fields.description: ClinVar clinical significance label.

fields.name: gene
fields.description: Gene symbol assigned by the local annotation data.

fields.name: condition
fields.description: ClinVar condition name.

fields.name: gnomad_found
fields.description: Whether the variant matched the local gnomAD parquet.

fields.name: gnomad_af
fields.description: gnomAD allele frequency.

fields.name: gnomad_ac
fields.description: gnomAD allele count.

fields.name: gnomad_an
fields.description: gnomAD allele number.

fields.name: gnomad_popmax
fields.description: Synthetic population maximum summary string.

fields.name: omim_found
fields.description: Whether the gene matched the local OMIM parquet.

fields.name: omim_mim_number
fields.description: OMIM MIM number.

fields.name: omim_phenotype
fields.description: OMIM phenotype description.

fields.name: omim_inheritance
fields.description: OMIM inheritance mode.
